title: Generative AI Foundation for HR Professionals
description:
This program explores Generative AI in Human Resources, giving HR professionals, recruiters, and business leaders the skills to design, optimize, and deploy AI-powered HR solutions. You’ll start with the foundations of Generative AI, mastering its applications in HR, prompt engineering basics, and advanced prompting techniques for tasks such as job descriptions, structured outputs, and role-based HR scenarios. From crafting effective prompts to refining advanced strategies, you’ll learn how to build smarter, scalable HR workflows.

You’ll then advance to AI for Recruitment, applying AI tools to job description creation, candidate screening, and interview preparation, while exploring AI-driven engagement through chatbots and personalized communication. Moving further, you’ll work with AI in Onboarding, designing personalized onboarding content, automating FAQs, creating employee handbooks, and building analytics-driven onboarding workflows to enhance new hire experiences. The program concludes with a capstone, where you develop AI-assisted recruitment and onboarding strategies, supported by structured projects, graded assessments, and reflective activities for practical mastery.

By the end of this program, you will be able to:

- Define the core concepts of Generative AI and explain its practical applications in HR.
- Apply widely used AI tools to streamline workflows and improve efficiency in HR processes.
- Design and refine effective prompts for completing diverse HR tasks across functions.
- Develop comprehensive recruitment strategies using AI for job ads, screening, and engagement.
- Construct personalized onboarding experiences supported by AI-generated content and analytics.

This program is designed for HR professionals, recruiters, L&D managers, and business leaders aiming to integrate Generative AI into workforce management and employee experience strategies. A foundation in HR practices and digital tools will help maximize your learning experience.

Join us to unlock the full potential of Generative AI in HR, and transform the way you recruit, onboard, and engage employees with next-generation AI systems.
